name: Mobile Robot Rubble Traversability Analysis
description: A search and rescue robotics engineer must validate how well a Pioneer P3DX mobile robot can navigate collapsed building debris without flipping over. Using the ZMQ Remote API, programmatically conduct three simulation trials where the robot drives forward for at least 5 simulated seconds through a procedurally generated rubble field of at least 30 dynamic primitive shapes. The scale of the rubble must increase with each trial. Record the simulation time, roll, pitch, and overall tilt magnitude of the chassis at each step. Export the time-series data to ~/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/traversability_timeseries.csv and a summary report to ~/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/traversability_report.json.
